text: Mom, I feel so anxious and can't sleep.
Can you tell me a bedtime story?
>> Once upon a time, there was a very nice
girl named Zoya. She was so good in
school. She was so good in college. Top
A+ grades all the time. Then she went on
date with this useless boy, Max. And Max
told her, "You're not having enough fun.
You're not relaxing enough. You're
working too much. Why you listening to
your mom so much?" He said, "My has a
boat. We will go boating around the
island. And she went on the boat and
what happened was that there was a big
giant killer whale and the giant killer
whale just came out from under the boat,
toppled the boat and just swallowed Zoya
and Max.
What?
Wait, what? That just gave me more
anxiety. Over time, you will see the
relaxing benefits of it. When people
invite you to go on a boat, you will
just say no. And you will date the nerdy
guy Sanjay.
